visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located in the front.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located behind the green can.
A brown plastic bottle with a green cap, to the left of the other cans.
A white can with purple and pink graphics, behind the brown bottle.

action_plan.explanation: Pick the green soda can because it is in front of and blocking access to the red soda can.
Pick the red soda can now that it is accessible.
